title: Creation of Maple World
description: The three Transcendents of Maple World are born along with the world itself. The Transcendents of Time, Life, and Light establish the fundamental laws of existence.

title: The Age of the Ancient Gods
description: The Ancient Gods shape the continents and establish the first civilizations. The three worlds, Maple World, Grandis, and the unnamed third world, exist in harmony.

title: Birth of the Grandis Transcendents
description: The Transcendents of Grandis come into being, including Darmoor, the Transcendent of Life. Their powers mirror those of Maple World's Transcendents.

title: The White Mage's Research
description: The White Mage, Transcendent of Light, begins researching the nature of light and darkness to find ultimate truth. His obsessive pursuit of knowledge slowly corrupts his purpose.

title: The White Mage's Corruption
description: The White Mage concludes that true light cannot exist without consuming all darkness, and paradoxically embraces the darkness entirely. He transforms into the Black Mage.

title: The Black Mage's Reign of Terror
description: Now fully corrupted, the Black Mage amasses an army of darkness and begins his conquest of Maple World. Civilizations fall as his Commanders spread destruction across the land.

title: Formation of the Black Mage Commanders
description: The Black Mage recruits powerful beings as his Commanders, each granted immense power. Hilla, Magnus, Arkarium, Lotus, Orchid, Damien, Lucid, Will, and Von Leon join his cause.
key_characters: Hilla, Magnus, Arkarium, Lotus, Orchid, Damien, Lucid, Will, Von Leon

title: Von Leon's Betrayal
description: King Von Leon of the Lion King's Castle, grief-stricken by his wife's death at the hands of Cygnus's ancestors, pledges his allegiance to the Black Mage in exchange for the power of revenge.

title: Rhinne's Imprisonment
description: The Black Mage captures Rhinne, the Transcendent of Time, and imprisons her in the Temple of Time. He uses her power to manipulate time itself for his grand plan.

title: Rise of the Six Heroes
description: Six legendary warriors rise to challenge the Black Mage's tyranny. Aran the warrior, Freud the dragon master, Mercedes the elf queen, Phantom the thief, Luminous the mage, and Shade unite.
key_characters: Aran, Freud, Mercedes, Phantom, Luminous, Shade

title: Freud and Afrien's Pact
description: Freud, the greatest magician of his era, forms a spirit pact with Afrien, king of the Onyx Dragons. Together they develop the strategy to seal the Black Mage.

title: The Final Battle Against the Black Mage (Ancient)
description: The six Heroes confront the Black Mage at the Temple of Time in an apocalyptic battle. Through immense sacrifice, they succeed in sealing him away.
key_characters: Aran, Freud, Mercedes, Phantom, Luminous, Shade, Black Mage

title: The Heroes' Sacrifice
description: The sealing curses each Hero differently: Aran loses all memories, Mercedes and her elves are frozen, Phantom is scattered, Luminous is corrupted by darkness, and Shade is erased from existence.

title: Afrien's Death and Freud's Legacy
description: Afrien sacrifices himself to protect Freud's final egg, which will eventually become Mir. Freud passes away shortly after, leaving behind his knowledge for future generations.

title: Centuries of Peace
description: With the Black Mage sealed, Maple World enters a long era of peace and rebuilding. The memory of the Heroes fades into legend as civilizations flourish once more.

title: Founding of the Explorer's Guild
description: As peace reigns, adventurer guilds form across Victoria Island. The four original job instructors, Dark Lord, Grendel, Dances with Balrog, and Athena Pierce, begin training new heroes.
key_characters: Dark Lord, Grendel the Really Old, Dances with Balrog, Athena Pierce

title: Empress Cygnus Ascends
description: Young Cygnus is crowned Empress of Ereve and establishes the Cygnus Knights to protect Maple World. With her divine beast Shinsoo, she prepares for the prophesied return of darkness.

title: The Black Wings Emerge
description: An organization called the Black Wings appears in Edelstein, secretly working to break the Black Mage's seal. Led by Orchid and controlled by Gelimer, they occupy the mining city.

title: The Resistance Forms
description: Citizens of Edelstein form an underground Resistance to fight the Black Wings' occupation. Led by Claudine, they recruit Battle Mages, Wild Hunters, Mechanics, and Blasters.

title: Aran Awakens on Rien
description: The warrior Hero Aran awakens from centuries of frozen slumber on Rien Island with no memories. Guided by Lilin, Aran begins the long journey to recover lost powers and memories.

title: Evan and Mir's Bond
description: A young farm boy named Evan discovers Freud's last dragon egg in a barn, and it hatches into Mir. Together they inherit Freud's legacy as the new Dragon Master.

title: Mercedes Returns to Elluel
description: The Elf Queen Mercedes and her people are freed from their icy prison in the Elluel forest. With diminished power, she must rebuild the elven kingdom while pursuing the Black Mage's followers.

title: Phantom's Revival
description: The master thief Phantom returns to find the world changed beyond recognition. Driven by his love for the fallen Empress Aria, he rejoins the fight against the Black Mage's forces.

title: Luminous and the Light of Corruption
description: Luminous awakens carrying a fragment of the Black Mage's darkness within himself. He struggles to maintain control as the light and dark powers within him wage constant war.

title: Shade's Forgotten Existence
description: The sixth Hero, Shade, exists in a state of being perpetually forgotten by everyone he meets. Erased from history by the sealing, he fights alone while no one remembers his sacrifice.

title: Magnus Invades Heliseum
description: The Black Mage Commander Magnus conquers Heliseum in Grandis and declares himself its ruler. The Nova people, including Kaiser and Angelic Buster, fight to reclaim their homeland.

title: Arkarium's Time Manipulation
description: Commander Arkarium manipulates events at the Temple of Time to weaken the Black Mage's seal. His scheming threatens to unravel the Heroes' ancient sacrifice.

title: The Maple Alliance Forms
description: Facing the growing threat of the Black Mage's return, the Cygnus Knights, Resistance, Heroes, and Adventurers formally unite as the Maple Alliance to prepare for war.

title: Black Heaven Assault
description: Gelimer launches the massive airship Black Heaven in a devastating attack on Maple World. The entire Maple Alliance mobilizes for an epic aerial battle in the skies above Ereve.

title: Lotus's Liberation and Gelimer's Defeat
description: During the Black Heaven battle, Lotus is freed from Gelimer's control and Gelimer is defeated. Orchid is reunited with her brother, though at great cost.

title: Damien's Assault on the World Tree
description: Half-demon Commander Damien attacks the World Tree to steal its power, threatening all life in Maple World. The six Heroes must reunite to stop his apocalyptic plan.
key_characters: Damien, Alicia, Aran, Evan, Mercedes, Phantom, Luminous, Shade

title: Alicia's Sacrifice at the World Tree
description: The Transcendent of Life, Alicia, sacrifices much of her remaining power to save the World Tree from Damien's corruption. Her weakening has dire consequences for Maple World.

title: The Arcane River Opens
description: A mysterious gateway opens to the Arcane River, a dimension between Maple World and the Black Mage's domain. Only those with Arcane Force can survive in this reality-warping realm.

title: Journey Through the Vanishing Journey
description: Adventurers enter the Vanishing Journey, a land where memories and existence slowly fade. They encounter Kao and learn about the nature of the Arcane River.

title: Muto's Hunger on Chu Chu Island
description: On the whimsical Chu Chu Island, adventurers discover the terrifying truth behind the toy kingdom. The entity Muto's insatiable hunger threatens to consume everything.

title: Lucid's Nightmare in Lachelein
description: Commander Lucid traps the residents of Lachelein in an endless nightmare ballroom. Adventurers must break through her dream manipulation to free the city's souls.

title: The Spirits of Arcana
description: In Arcana, adventurers discover a realm where nature spirits maintain the cycle of life and death. The Black Mage's corruption has begun to unravel this ancient balance.

title: Tana and the Memory Swamp
description: In Morass, adventurers meet Tana and witness distorted replays of Maple World's past events. The truth about the Black Mage's manipulation of history begins to surface.

title: Will's Manipulation in Esfera
description: Commander Will reveals himself as the mastermind behind many events in the Arcane River. At the edge of existence in Esfera, adventurers finally open the path to Tenebris.

title: The Alliance Crosses Moonbridge
description: The entire Maple Alliance marches across the Moonbridge, a bridge of light spanning the void to Tenebris. They face endless waves of the Black Mage's forces during the crossing.

title: Verus Hilla and the Labyrinth
description: Hilla, empowered to her true Verus form, guards the Labyrinth of Suffering. Adventurers must face their deepest psychological torments while battling the necromancer's dark magic.

title: Cygnus's Growth
description: During the Labyrinth of Suffering, Empress Cygnus undergoes a dramatic transformation, unlocking her true power. She becomes one of the strongest forces in the Alliance.

title: Arrival at Limina
description: The Alliance reaches Limina, the end of the world where the Black Mage waits on his throne of darkness. Reality itself begins to unravel as the final confrontation approaches.

title: The Black Mage's True Plan Revealed
description: The Black Mage reveals that his ultimate goal was never mere destruction but the complete recreation of all worlds. He sought to destroy and rebuild existence without the flaws he perceived.

title: The Final Battle with the Black Mage
description: In an apocalyptic confrontation, the Adventurer and the entire Maple Alliance face the Black Mage at full power. The battle shakes the foundations of all three worlds.
key_characters: Black Mage, Adventurer, Heroes, Cygnus, Alliance

title: The Black Mage's Defeat
description: The Black Mage is finally destroyed, ending the centuries-long conflict. However, his defeat unleashes a chain of events that links the fate of Maple World to Grandis irrevocably.

title: The New Age Begins
description: With the Black Mage gone, Maple World enters a new era. But the Transcendent of Life in Grandis, Darmoor, now poses the greatest threat to all worlds.

title: The Sacred Flame of Cernium
description: Adventurers arrive in the holy city of Cernium in Grandis, where the sacred flame burns eternal. The High Flora army besieges the city, beginning the Grandis saga in earnest.

title: Seren, the Chosen One
description: Seren is revealed as a key figure in the Grandis conflict, bearing the burden of the Chosen One's destiny. Her connection to the Transcendents shapes the future of the war.

title: Mysteries of Hotel Arcus
description: The dimensional Hotel Arcus serves as a crossroads between worlds. Its mysterious owner Putan holds secrets about the nature of the Grandis conflict and the Transcendents' true intentions.

title: Odium: Secrets of the Ancient Dwarves
description: Deep underground in Odium, adventurers discover the remnants of an ancient dwarven civilization. Their mechanical technology and records reveal truths about the Godsphere and Ancient Gods.

title: The Paradise of Shangri-La
description: In the hidden paradise of Shangri-La, adventurers encounter Eastern mythology made real. Ancient powers connected to the Transcendents sleep beneath its tranquil beauty.

title: Arteria: The Heart of Grandis
description: Adventurers reach Arteria, where the life force of the Grandis continent converges. Deeper truths about Darmoor's plan and the fate of all three worlds are revealed.

title: Carcion: The Next Frontier
description: The latest chapter of the Grandis saga unfolds in Carcion, where Darmoor's influence grows ever stronger. The final confrontation with the Transcendent of Life draws closer.

title: Darmoor's Grand Design
description: As the Grandis saga progresses, Darmoor's ultimate plan becomes clearer. Unlike the Black Mage who sought recreation, Darmoor pursues absolute control over the cycle of life and death itself.
